overall.description: Static shot of a gothic stone classroom or great hall from a video game, featuring vaulted ceilings, hanging lanterns, and students in robes. The scene has a medieval magical atmosphere with warm interior lighting and stone architecture.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom hall from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing at a wooden work table, handling objects

entered.detail: Gothic ribbed stone vaulting with arches spanning the hall
Warm glowing lanterns suspended from chains providing ambient light
Grey stone block walls with tall arched windows
Long wooden tables with cauldrons and magical equipment
Wooden work table with stacked cauldrons and books

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a static view of a gothic stone classroom featuring vaulted ceilings and hanging lanterns. A student stands at a work table in the right foreground, while other students are seated at tables in the background.

events.description: student in dark robes walks from right foreground toward the center-left of the room

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary position as a student crosses the foreground

notable_agents.action: student walking from right to left across the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera remains static as a student walks across the foreground from right to left, passing the work tables. Background activity continues with students working under the warm lantern light in the stone hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective of a gothic stone classroom where the stillness of the architecture is punctuated by the movement of students. It begins with a static view of the hall, highlighting the vaulted ceilings and warm glow of hanging lanterns above students seated at distant tables. As the scene unfolds, a student in the right foreground stands at a work table, grounding the composition within the medieval magical atmosphere. The focus then shifts as another student walks across the foreground from right to left, passing the tables while the background activity continues undisturbed. The shot concludes with this fluid motion cutting through the otherwise stationary environment of the stone hall.
